From: LlamaIndex <news@llamaindex.ai>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Tue, 25 Feb 2025 14:30:00 +0000
Subject: LlamaIndex Newsletter 2025-02-25
Message-ID: <ywYOgLBfTmq_1AWL8Sonkg@geopod-ismtpd-33>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="8c88df322654707808be1f6fef6dc7c61915d5d629f92e003c2116cb0a44"

Hi there, Llama fans! 🦙

Welcome to this week's edition of the LlamaIndex newsletter!
We're thrilled to share some exciting updates, including the
launch of LlamaCloud EU, enhancements to LlamaParse, and
innovative frameworks for building knowledge agents. Dive into
this week's highlights and community contributions to maximize
your experience with LlamaIndex!

🤩 The Highlights:

* Claude Sonnet 3.7 support: Our friends at Anthropic dropped
Claude Sonnet 3.7 and the vibes (and the evals) are good! We
released day 0 support yesterday, just pip install the latest
integration to get it: pip install llama-index-llms-anthropic
--upgrade. Check out their announcement post 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..qLRctWDXH2cUSKW7JCBrBNDkwQHwvCj2DQXPjr8IkAw ).

* LLM Consortium Implementation: Our talented frameworks engineer
Massimiliano Pippi has built an implementation of @karpathy's
suggestion of an "LLM Consortium" using LlamaIndex. This allows
multiple LLMs to answer the same question, with an arbiter
synthesizing the responses. Check out the notebook 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..0OCXxmQ0wVTqHxgTmFKuUV-xLUWYQ5B-s11dIVnWTGM ) and Massi's LinkedIn post 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..54XLHxkLYc_RlmWAq5YmMM9IoUKiLPqRj6-exhuQPlk ) for more details!

* Architectures for Knowledge Agents: Explore the potential of
LLMs to automate knowledge work over unstructured enterprise data
in this insightful talk by @jerryjliu0. The session covers
essential components for building knowledge agentic workflows.
Don't miss the slides ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..neK39R0CjnsuiG60eg6dOdWxQW92UimXLblZfJsl3Xs ) and reach out
if you're interested in deploying enterprise knowledge agents!

🗺️ LlamaCloud & LlamaParse:

* LlamaCloud EU Announcement: We're excited to announce early
access to LlamaCloud EU, ensuring full data residency within EU
jurisdiction for secure knowledge management. Learn more and
request early access here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..jL3j6RGxtxRTEFmv9X8Ftz7RfhM9AgAPFNDZwxBB7Mo ).

* LlamaParse Upgrades: Discover the latest enhancements to
LlamaParse, including new parsing modes and integration of Large
Vision Models (LVMs) for improved accuracy. Read the full
update here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..JzoA53zXQTaSydJblfAwXrptc_KBPyQTlgtfORWUr_c ).

✨ Framework:

* New Features in LlamaIndex: LlamaIndex.TS has been streamlined
for easier deployment. It's over 10 times smaller now! Check out
the details ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..jYkM5rr-LJJUQZ276h8Fnmc0ofoTWjzUNJoehXmyGWM ) to see how it can benefit
your projects.

* Automated Sales Outreach Agent: Learn how to build an agent
that writes outreach emails and schedules meetings using
@llama_index workflows and tools from @composiohq. Access
the notebook ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..FhJM7WQ6RRoK-z7fjg1oUz75TV0xYzHhQTGDMr2dq3I ) to get started!

✍️ Community:

* Build Tetris with AI: Check out this tutorial from
@KaranVaidya6 on creating a Tetris game using an AI agent in just
50 lines of code! Read more ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..iYPlWtN4wzbqRsl4KyTG6vvkVKxieuU077Zhm3VJl-k ).

* Arabic-Focused Model Release: Our friends at @mistralAI have
released a new Arabic-focused small model, Mistral Saba, with day
0 support. Get it here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..vhvhAEU_8LGcH4mcwDINXZDh_xOTwn6MJa9VWBxAN9A ).

* Vendor Questionnaire App: Explore a full-stack app by
@patrickrolsen that answers vendor questionnaires using semantic
retrieval and LLM enhancement. Check it out here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..0uN2dZZFZtwSPfE2gzG-rIXvrCMk5_Mi5yuhpnuuqIk ).

* Exclusive AI Infrastructure Talks: Join us on March 5 for
insightful discussions on AI infrastructure innovations and
practical applications. RSVP here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..nMueKKPVDeRp_5T2emOedPh-r9HOsQW5QdraCBiPieE ).

Thank you for being part of our community! We look forward to
sharing more exciting updates next week. If you have any
questions or feedback, feel free to reach out!

Best,
The LlamaIndex Team

* Calling all enterprises: are you building with LlamaIndex? We
are working hard to make LlamaIndex even more Enterprise-ready
and have sneak peeks at our upcoming products available for
partners. Interested? Get in touch. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..tnEXf4JGjoQlgWnCzpHg6Sar1Og2ycE6vkGrEACbNxg )

* Join our Discord ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..UzaI3ZXuKF8g3YUzxqC0635K53ytC71Tf1-te54TMk0 )
community for live discussions and support.

* Check out our GitHub ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..O0Db7mke0wHhCckVXrGpwjeHuPGKMFMvM76E6-1KqCM )  for the latest code releases and documentation.

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community. We're
here to help you unleash the power of LLMs over your data!

Best regards,
The LlamaIndex Team
